channel.title: HIPAA on DevOpStars | DevOps Consulting Delaware | US Engineering Teams
channel.description: Recent content in HIPAA on DevOpStars | DevOps Consulting Delaware | US Engineering Teams

item.title: HIPAA-Compliant CI/CD Pipelines: What Healthcare Engineering Teams Need to Know
item.description: Most healthtech CI/CD pipelines inadvertently process PHI in build logs and test fixtures - creating OCR breach notification exposure teams don’t know exists. Here’s how to fix it.
